overall.description: A cinematic gameplay clip from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, opening with a first-person view of a Space Marine observing a massive energy vortex in a chaotic void, then transitioning to third-person perspective as the character runs through the gothic wastelands of Demerium alongside fellow battle brothers.

scene_state.functional_zone: chaotic void realm with energy vortex and floating debris

events.description: energy vortex intensifies with brighter cyan light and electrical arcs
bright flash of light transitions from void dimension to wasteland environment

agents.ego_description: standing in power armor, looking up at the massive pulsating energy vortex in the void

entered.detail: massive column of bright blue energy with crackling electrical arcs
large rocks and fragments suspended in zero gravity
scattered rocky fragments floating in the purple void
enormous metal chains drifting through the void space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside Space Marine power armor, looking up at a massive energy vortex in a chaotic void filled with floating debris and chains. The energy intensifies with electrical arcs before a bright flash transitions the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic wasteland graveyard with cathedral ruins

events.description: emerges from void into dark wasteland with gothic architecture and burning fires
character accelerates into full sprint through the ruins alongside allies

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the graveyard ruins in heavy power armor alongside battle brothers

notable_agents.action: fellow Space Marine in blue armor running alongside through the graveyard

entered.detail: large ruined gothic structure with pointed arches and broken spires
scattered stone grave markers across the broken pavement
orange flames burning in braziers providing illumination
wrecked armored vehicle with open hatches and battle damage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the Demerium Wastelands, a dark gothic landscape with ruined cathedrals and gravestones. The camera follows the Space Marine from third-person as he runs through the cobblestone ruins alongside a battle brother, passing burning fires and destroyed vehicles under an overcast night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a surreal, chaotic void into a dark, gothic wasteland. It begins from a first-person perspective inside power armor, looking up at a massive energy vortex surrounded by floating debris and chains. As electrical arcs intensify, a sudden bright flash of light shifts the environment entirely, transporting the viewer to the Demerium Wastelands. The camera then pulls back into a third-person view, following a Space Marine and his battle brother as they sprint through cobblestone ruins past burning fires and destroyed vehicles. The scene finally opens up to reveal a bleak landscape of ruined cathedrals and gravestones under a heavy, overcast night sky.
